hooks.command: cat >/dev/null; npx tsc --noEmit && npm test && npm run test:screenshots
hooks.statusMessage: Quality gate: tsc + unit tests + screenshots...

hooks.command: jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command | test("git push")) then {"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"QUALITY GATE: You just pushed to git. Run through this checklist NOW — do not tell the user the work is done until every item is checked: (1) npx tsc --noEmit — must be clean. (2) pnpm test — all passing. (3) pnpm test:screenshots — no regressions. (4) pnpm build — clean build. (5) README.md / docs/ — MANDATORY: re-read every README section that touches the changed feature and update any stale copy; if the feature is new to users, add it. This step is not optional and is frequently skipped — do it explicitly. (6) Screenshots regenerated (pnpm test:screenshots:update) if any desktop UI changed. (7) Do NOT merge locally — push branch, open PR."}} | tojson else empty end'
